title: Nexus OutlinePatchChapterSet
description: Fields to update on a chapter via the outline canvas patch route (V1.72).

title.description: Display title for the chapter (UI-only; persisted in the work outline frontmatter).

planned_word_count.description: Planned word count for the chapter.

actual_word_count.description: Actual word count for the chapter, if known.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the chapter. published is read/protected in V1.72 patch routes unless explicitly authorized.
